MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Scott E. Hennigh, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: Shimmick Construction Co.
Glenn D. Dassoff, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & opposing party: Certified Coatings of California, Inc.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants Shimmick Construction Company/Obayshi, Shimmick Construction Company, Inc., Obayashi Coorporation's Motion For Protective Order is denied. No order has been made by the court which requires this matter to be arbitrated. The court will not determine the objections to any discovery requests on this motion. The parties must meet and confer on any objections which may be made at deposition or in response to any requests for production of documents. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
